headline: Broadcom Shares Rise 5% Post Q1 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: AVGO jumps after a Q1 beat as AI-driven semiconductor revenues surge and Q2 outlook points to $22B sales, but a premium valuation could limit the upside.

headline: Is Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Offering Value After Multi Year Share Price Weakness
summary: Wondering if Skyworks Solutions is a bargain or a value trap at current levels? This article will help you make sense of where the stock stands today on the valuation front. Skyworks closed at US$56.48, with returns of 1.0% over 30 days, a 12.3% decline year to date, and an 11.9% decline over the past year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 44.9% and 62.7% declines respectively. Recent attention on Skyworks has focused on its role in the semiconductor sector and how its customer mix and...
